note: Harder toy: 8 actions (4 cardinals + 4 diagonals at ~equal magnitude). Pixel-delta head start=16, pixel_cf_allact, step=20, K=8, 10000 steps, 3 seeds.
verdict: scales to 8 actions: K=8 (no slack) 0.62 with code conflation; K=12 (slack) 0.79 mean, 0.91 best, crisp render. Code slack is the lever (as at 4 actions).

k12_code_slack.note: K=12 (slack) improves 8-action NMI 0.62->0.79 (best 0.91) — the slack lever scales the method to 8 actions
